Build-Depends: cmark-gfm <!nodoc>, debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-rust, help2man <!nodoc>, librust-allocator-api2-dev, librust-bincode-dev, librust-bumpalo-dev, librust-clap-dev, librust-hashbrown-dev, librust-log-dev, librust-pretty-env-logger-dev, librust-rustc-hash-dev, librust-serde-dev, librust-smallvec-dev, libstd-rust-dev
Description: backtracking register allocator regalloc2 is a register allocator that started life as, and is about 50% still, a port of IonMonkey's backtracking register allocator to Rust. In many regards, it has been generalized, optimized, and improved since the initial port. . In addition, it contains substantial amounts of testing infrastructure (fuzzing harnesses and checkers) that does not exist in the original IonMonkey allocator.
Package-List: librust-regalloc2-dev deb rust optional arch=all regalloc2-tool deb rust optional arch=any
Testsuite-Triggers: dh-rust, librust-regalloc2-0.12+checker-dev, librust-regalloc2-0.12+default-dev, librust-regalloc2-0.12+enable-serde-dev, librust-regalloc2-0.12+std-dev, librust-regalloc2-0.12+trace-log-dev
